reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 처음에 가격이 비싸서 고민했는데 할인할때 잘 산 것 같아요! 여행갈때 모든 대중교통 이용이 가능하면서 가볍고 반려견이 불편해하지 않는 그런 가방을 찾고 있었는데 여러모로 제 맘에 쏙 들어서 구입하게 됐어요:) 일단 본체와 안쪽 쿠션 색감 조합이 넘 이쁘고 때가 잘 탈 것 같지만 생각보다 때가 덜 타는 소재예요. 뭐 묻으면 물티슈로 가볍게 닦아주면 되는! 쿠션감이 좋고 균형이 잘 잡혀서 예민한 제 반려견도 편안하게 잘 들어가 있고 사이즈도 적당하면서 무엇보다 가볍고 숄더할때 끈을 따로 부착하지 않고 늘리고 줄일 수 있어서 깔끔하고 오히려 전 편하게 느껴져요. 수납할 수 있는 주머니도 많아서 좋고 메쉬망부분도 락슬라이더 기능있는 지퍼로 되어 있어서 안심되어요! 아직까지는 넘넘 만족스럽게 잘 사용 중이예요:)
reviews.content_en: I was hesitant about the price at first, but I think I got a great deal during the sale! I was looking for a bag that's lightweight, works with all public transportation when traveling, and doesn't inconvenience my dog - and this checked all the boxes :) The color combination of the main bag and inner cushion is so pretty, and while it looks like it might stain easily, the material actually resists dirt better than expected. A quick wipe with a wet tissue does the trick! The cushioning feels great and is well-balanced, so even my sensitive pup settles in comfortably. The size is just right, and most importantly, it's lightweight. The shoulder strap is adjustable without needing separate attachments, which feels clean and convenient for me. There are lots of storage pockets, and the mesh section has a lock zipper, which gives me peace of mind! I'm super satisfied with how it's working out so far :)

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
2살이 되어서야 처음으로 구매한 이동가방 에쎕떱...🤍 엄마마음에도 강아지 마음에도 쏙 든 가방이예요 !!! 깔끔한 디자인에 수납도 좋아 마롱백 꼭 갖고 싶었는데.. 블랙이라니 때 탈 걱정도 없고 체크 포인트까지 너무 예뻐요! 

몸무게가 3.6kg 이고 등길이 29cm 인 말티푸 아이예용
편하게 누워있기도 하고 메쉬망 닫았을 때도 얼굴 빼꼼 내밀고 잘 엎드려 있네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I bought my first carrier bag for my pup when she turned 2 years old - an ESSETTE 🤍 It's a bag that won my heart and my dog's heart!!! I wanted a sleek design with good storage like a Marong bag, and since it's black, I don't have to worry about stains. The checkered accent is so cute! 

My Maltipoo weighs 3.6kg and has a back length of 29cm.
She lies down comfortably, and even with the mesh closed, she pokes her face out and lies down flat hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배송빠르고 좋아요
견고하고 컬러감이 예뻐요
reviews.content_en:
Fast shipping and great!
Sturdy and beautiful colors.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 민트색 사거 싶었는데 품절이라 고민하다가 블랙으로 샀는데 대만족!! 사실 안에 체크 무늬가 마음에 안들었느데 상품받아보니 괜한 생각한거 같네요 참에 생각보다 부풀지않아서 엥 했는데 시간지나니 빵빵해지고 무엇보다 강아지가 좋아하니 저도 좋네염 실물이 더 예빠얌 할인할때 잘 산거같아욤
reviews.content_en: I wanted the mint color but it was sold out, so I thought about it and got black instead - and I'm so happy!! Honestly, I wasn't sure about the inner checkered pattern at first, but when I got the product, I realized my worries were pointless. At first I was surprised it didn't puff up as much as I expected, but after some time it became nice and fluffy. Most importantly, my dog loves it so I love it too! The real product is even prettier than the photos. Got a great deal during the sale!

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 예쁩니다 진짜 진짜 대박 예쁘구요 폭신하니 저희 테디 너무 마음에 들어 하더라구요ㅜㅜ 최고에요 블랙이랑 휘뚜루 마뚜루 들기도 좋구요! 완전 가벼워요!! 정착합니다...❤️
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty! Seriously, SO incredibly pretty, and it's so cushioned that my Teddy really loves it ㅜㅜ It's the best! It's easy to carry with the black and strap. It's super light!! I'm keeping it forever...❤️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 생각보다 사이즈가 넘 커서 무거울까 걱정했지만, 가볍고 예뻐서 넘 맘에 들었습니다. 무엇보다 울 강아지가 편하게 누워서 즐길 수 있는 점이 가장 만족스럽습니다.
reviews.content_en: I was worried the size might be too big and heavy, but it's actually lightweight and pretty, so I'm really happy with it. Most importantly, I'm most satisfied that my dog can lie down comfortably and enjoy being in it.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 3kg 미니비숑 입니다 편한지 알아서 들어가서 누워있어요 가방 자체도 가볍고 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: I have a 3kg mini Bichon. She goes in on her own and lies down comfortably. The bag itself is lightweight and great.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
정말 너무 만족해요 ◡̈ 
두 마리라 하나 사고 만족해서 다른거 고민하다 동일한거 샀는데 좀만 늦게 살걸 그랬나봐요 신상 색감이🥹
reviews.content_en: I'm really so satisfied ◡̈ I have two dogs so I bought one and was so happy with it that I bought the same one again. I wish I'd bought them a bit later - the new colors look so good 🥹

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
예전부터 사고 싶던 가방인데, 가격 때문에 고민하던 찰나에  할인쿠폰으로 좋은 가격에 잘 산거  같아요..!

그동안 이동가방을 몇개 실패했어서 이번에도 안 둘어가면 어쩌나, 훈련을 어떻게 시켜볼까 고민하고 있었는데 강아지 혼자서 쏙 들어가서 턱 괴고 눕는거 보고 너무 감동적이었습니다ㅜㅠ

바닥 처짐 물론 없고, 쿠션이 폭신폭신하면서도 딱딱하지도, 흐물거리지도 않아서 좋아요

다른걸 다 떠나서 강아지가 써주는 것만으로도 너무너무 만족입니당🐶🐶

3kg, 등길이 27cm 강아지가 쓰기에 사이즈도 아주 적절합니다
reviews.content_en:
This is a bag I've wanted for a while, and I was hesitant because of the price. But getting it on sale with a coupon felt like a great deal!

I've had failures with carrier bags before, so I was worried about whether my dog would even go in or how I'd train her. But seeing my pup go in on her own, rest her chin on the edge, and lie down was so touching ㅜㅠ

There's no sagging at the bottom, and the cushioning is fluffy but firm - not too hard or squishy. That's perfect!

Aside from everything else, the fact that my dog actually uses it makes me so incredibly satisfied 🐶🐶

For a 3kg dog with a back length of 27cm, the size is just perfect.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
악~ 구입하고나니 만우절쿠폰이라니ㅋ 그래도 주말 잘사용했숩니다ㅋㅋ
원체 블랙매니아라 전부터 고민했눈데 망사가 답답할거같아 고민하던차 망사가 리뉴얼되었다는 소식에 낼름 구입했어요~ㅎㅎ 저도 요렇게 크로스스트랩이 붙어있눈게 편하드라구요. 그냥 숄더로만 맬일은 거의 없어서요. 가방이 원체 폭신해서인지 크로스로 매면 애얼굴이좀 많이 찌그러지긴 하눈데ㅋㅋ 대중교통이용후 답답할까봐 얼른 열어줫눈데도 안나오는거봄 편한가봐용ㅋㅋ

한가지 아쉬운점이라하면 첫번째 똑단추가 전체닫음하면 얼굴가운데를 따악 가리네요;;; 에코..
헌데 또 망사가 탄탄해서 쟈철내리면서 망사를 위로살짝 빼꼼 올려주기 편하네요.ㅋㅋ
그리고 또하나 포켓이 다 오픈되어있어서 사용하기눈 참편하고 좋더라구요.
헌데 포켓에 간식봉투는 못넣겠어요. 식탐많은 저희 댕댕이 얼굴이 자꾸 글로 들어가려고 하네요 ㅋㅋ
하나정도는 지퍼포켓이었음하는 아쉬움 있습니다~ 헤헤
나중에 또 리뉴얼되면 고민좀 해봐주셨음하눈 바램에 주저리 남겨봅니다~

요즘 뜸했눈데 넘맘에들어서 블로그후기한번 남겨봐야겠어요~
reviews.content_en:
Oh! After I bought it, there was an April Fools' coupon 😅 But I used it well over the weekend lol. I've always been a black enthusiast and was thinking about it before, but I was worried the mesh might feel stuffy. When I heard the mesh was redesigned, I jumped on it right away~ hehe. I find the cross strap attached to be convenient. I rarely use just the shoulder strap alone. The bag is so cushioned that when I carry it cross-body, my pup's face gets a little compressed hehe But after using public transportation, I opened it quickly worried she'd be uncomfortable, but she didn't even come out - so I guess she was fine lol.

One small complaint is that the first snap button covers her face in the middle when fully closed... eco. But the mesh is so sturdy that it's easy to slip the mesh up a bit as I close the zipper hehe.

Also, all the pockets are open, which is super convenient to use. But I can't put snack bags in the pockets because my food-loving pup keeps trying to stick her face in there lol. I wish at least one pocket had a zipper~ hehe.

If there's another redesign later, I hope you'll consider that feedback. I'm writing this extra note because I haven't posted in a while, but I'm so happy with it that I should leave a blog review soon~

reviews.name: 숙****
reviews.content:
사구나서 세일해서 반품하고 다시결재할가 했지만 너무귀찮아서 그냥 세일가격에 하나더샀어요 ㅜㅜ 두개필요한거라
끈조절가능해서 구매한이유중에 하나예요
어깨패드 솜빵빵해서 조아요
요새가방은 다들 튼튼하게만들어서
나한테 실용성을 생각해서 고른거라
넘 만족합니다
1. 푹신푹신해서 아기한테 편한거
2. 끈조절가능해서 크로스로 맬수있다는거
3.때가 안타는 블랙색상이 있다는거

진짜 아가들가방 여러개있는데 어떤건 무겁고
어떤건 힘이업고 가방실패 너무마니했는데
정착입니다

푹신푹신하고 탄탄
reviews.content_en:
I bought it and then there was a sale, so I almost returned it and repurchased at the sale price, but it was too annoying so I just bought one more at the sale price instead hehe. I needed two anyway.
One reason I bought it was because the straps are adjustable.
I love the shoulder pad - it's nice and fluffy.
These days bags are made sturdy, so I chose this for practicality.
I'm super satisfied.
1. It's so fluffy that it's comfortable for my baby
2. The straps are adjustable so I can carry it cross-body
3. There's a black color that doesn't show stains

I have several dog bags and some are heavy, some aren't sturdy - I've had so many bag failures, but this is finally the one.
Fluffy and sturdy.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 5kg 등길이36cm 아이이구요. 저는 156에 45키로 입니다. 2사이즈인데도 생각보다 맸을때 가방이 많이 안커보여서 좋았고 바닥 진짜 튼튼해서 무너짐이 없어요. 안쪽끈은 최대한짧게, 바깥쪽끈은 최대한길게 해서 엑스자로 매면 거의 기울어짐 없이 맬 수 있어요. 워낙 예민하고 이런거 생전 안해봐서 그런지 편하게 엎드려있진 못하지만 움직이지도 않고 잘있네요. 한10분매고 돌아다녀봤는데.. 무겁긴 무거워요..ㅎ 가방자체도 가벼운건 아니라 오래돌아다니긴 어려울꺼같아요. 그치만 저는 차로 왔다갔다하기 편할려고 산거라 괜찮아요. 디자인도 너무 예쁘고 겉에는 살짝 방수 재질이라 때도 잘 안탈 것 같아요. 저도 큰맘먹고 할부로 산건데 비싼값 하네용 고민하지말고 질러버렷
reviews.content_en: My dog is 5kg with a back length of 36cm. I'm 156cm and 45kg. Even though it's size 2, when I wear it the bag doesn't look too big, which is nice. The bottom is really sturdy so there's no sagging. If I keep the inner straps as short as possible and the outer straps as long as possible and wear it crossed, it stays pretty level. Since my pup is sensitive and has never done this before, she doesn't lie down comfortably, but she stays still and is fine. I wore it for about 10 minutes and walked around... it is heavy though haha. The bag itself isn't that light so it would be hard to carry for long periods. But I bought it to make trips to the car easier, so it's fine. The design is so pretty and the outside has a slightly water-resistant material so it shouldn't stain easily. I made a big decision and paid in installments, and it's worth the price. Don't hesitate - just go for it!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
우와 정말 예뻐요 
더현대서울 위펫 매장 갔다가 실제보고 구매했는데 정말 가볍고 안에 애기가 올라갈 쿠션소재가 너무너무 부드럽고 감촉이 좋아요! 😍 리뉴얼전버전이 어깨끈조절 되서 고민했는데 리뉴얼후 버전이 가볍고 크로스끈도 들어있어서 이걸로하길 너무 잘했어요>.< 그리구 리카리카 쿠션백 블랙도 했는데 , ssfw 크림색이 털붙는것도 안보이고 밖에 엠보도 너무 귀엽습니당 너무 예쁜 우리애기 거의..첫백  예쁘게 잘쓰겟습니다 넘 맘에들어서 후기 아주 길게 남겨용
reviews.content_en: Wow, it's really so pretty! I went to the WePet store at The Hyundai Seoul, saw it in person, and bought it. It's really lightweight and the cushion material inside for the pup is so so soft and feels amazing! 😍 I was torn about the previous version's shoulder strap adjustment, but I'm so glad I got the renewed version - it's lighter and comes with a cross strap. Plus I also got the LICA LICA cushion bag in black, and the SSFW cream color doesn't show fur sticking to it, and the embossing outside is so cute! It's such a pretty first bag for my baby. I'll use it well 😊 The long review is because I'm so in love with it!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 강아지 이동가방 선택하기 너무 어려웠어요…브랜드도 많고 실제로 보고 구매하는것도 아니기에 실패도 해봤고요 근데 SSFW토이팟 구매해보고 재질을 강아지가 너무 좋아했고 마론백 상세사진에 생수를 넣고 들어도 쳐짐이 없는 사진을 보고 여기서 마론백을 구매하게 되었어요. 근데 구매할때 마침 세일까지 해서 완전 득템했네요. 전체적으로 다 만족스러운데 한가지 아쉬운점은 아래 내부쿠션 끝쪽에 고정할수 있는게 뭔가 있으면 더 좋았을것 같아요 강아지가 아기강아지라 구런지 그게 계속 밀리더라구요^^ 아무튼 아기강아지 천방지축이라 절대 가만히 있지 않아서 예전다른 가방쓸때 너무 힘들었는데 마론백은 편안한지 저렇게 있는게 신기해서 사진찍었어요 ㅎㅎ 정말 추천합니다
reviews.content_en: Choosing a dog carrier was so hard... there are so many brands and since I couldn't see it in person before buying, I've had failures. But after trying the SSFW Toy Pot, my dog really liked the material. And seeing the detail photos of the Marong bag showing no sagging even with a bottle of water in it, I decided to buy the Marong bag here. Plus there was a sale when I purchased, so I totally scored! I'm satisfied with everything overall, but one thing I wish is that there was something to secure the bottom inner cushion edge - my pup being a baby puppy, it kept sliding hehe. Anyway, since my baby pup is always rambunctious and never stays still, it was so hard with my previous bag. But it's amazing that she's so comfortable in the Marong bag that she just stays there, so I took a photo hehe I really recommend it!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 열어놓고 사용하기에는 진짜 딱이에요. 가방도 너무 너무 예쁘고 고급지고 탄탄하고 소재도 좋아요. 근데 대중교통 이용시에는 아이가 너무 딱 맞아서 불편할 것 같아요ㅜㅜ몸무게3.3kg, 등길이 28cm로, 상세설명보고 산건데 조금만 더 여유있었으면 좋았을 것 같아요. 이 외에는 다 만족스러워요!
reviews.content_en: It's really perfect for using open. The bag is so so pretty, high-quality, sturdy, and the material is great. But when using public transportation, my pup fits so snugly that I worry it might be uncomfortable ㅜㅜ My pup weighs 3.3kg with a back length of 28cm, and I bought it based on the detailed description, but I wish it had a bit more room. Other than that, I'm satisfied with everything!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 4kg 말티푸인데 딱 맞아요! 저희집 강아지가 실머파티푸들이라 검정색이 넘 잘어울리네용ㅎㅎ 수납공간도 넉넉히고 밑으로 처지지도 않고 턱 받치는 쿠션도 폭신해요! 매쉬망은 사용하지 않을때 정리 할 수도 있게 만들어져서 비싼 가방 값 하는거 같아요 체고🥰❤️
reviews.content_en: I have a 4kg Maltipoo and it fits perfectly! Since my pup is a miniature Poodle mix, the black looks so good on her hehe There's plenty of storage space and no sagging at the bottom, and the chin-supporting cushion is nice and fluffy! The mesh can even be folded away when not in use, so it really lives up to the expensive price 👍❤️

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
3.7~3.9kg/ 등길이29 말티즈입니다!
장점부터 말씀드리면 가방바닥은 단단해서 강아지가 서있어도 괜찮더라구요. 또 가방자체가 푹신해서 강아지가 집에서도 자주 들어가 앉아있어서 좋구요. 디자인이 이뻐서 좋아요.
단점이, 가방 바닥쿠션이 세로로 길어 발이 양쪽으로 빠지고 나중에 집와서 보면 쿠션이 한쪽으로 쏠려있어요. + 가방 앞쪽 턱이 낮아서 신명날때 발광하는 우리집 강아쥐같은 친구들은 앞으로 떨어질수있어요ㅜ 참고하세요!
아 가방은 딱맞게사서 닫히긴하지만 왠만하면 안닫고 씁니다. (대중교통은 다른가방으로)
금액이 금액인지라 아쉬운부분이 더 보이긴합니다.
reviews.content_en:
I'm a 3.7-3.9kg Maltese with a back length of 29!
Starting with the pros: the bag bottom is firm so my dog can stand in it without issues. Also, since the bag itself is fluffy, my dog frequently goes in and sits at home, which is nice. I like the pretty design.
The cons are: the bottom cushion is vertically long so her feet slip to the sides, and when I get home, the cushion has shifted to one side. + The front edge of the bag is low, so for rowdy pups like mine who get excited, they might fall out the front ㅜ Please note!
Oh, the bag fits snugly when closed, but I mostly use it open. (I use a different bag for public transportation)
Because of the price, I notice the disappointing parts more.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
지퍼가 락지퍼로 개선되었고 블랙이라 예뻐서 구입했어요. 가방 가볍고 폭신하니 좋아요. 오늘 매고 산책하고 동반식당도 갔었는데 대만족입니다~
2.8키로, 등길이25예요~
reviews.content_en:
The zipper was improved to a lock slider and it's black so it looks pretty, so I bought it. The bag is light and fluffy which is nice. Today I wore it and went on a walk and even to a dog-friendly restaurant - totally satisfied~
My pup weighs 2.8kg with a back length of 25~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
어제 주문했는데 다음날 빠르게 잘 도착 했습니다.
한달이 넘게 고민하고 검색하고 펫페어도 가 보고 했으나 마음에 드는 걸 찾지 못하다
주문한만큼 아주 마음에 들어요.
모두 예뻐서 고민했으나 가장 기본으로 했고요.
무얼 선택하든 다 만족할만큼 예쁘고 안정감도 있어 만족합니다.
처음 구입해 보는거라 여러번 문의 드렸는데 너무 친절히 빠루 답변해 주셔서
감사했습니다.
reviews.content_en:
I ordered yesterday and it arrived quickly the next day.
After deliberating for over a month, searching, and even going to a pet fair, I couldn't find anything I really liked.
Since I ordered it, I'm very happy with it.
I was torn between all the options but went with the most basic.
No matter what you choose, everything is so pretty and stable that you'll be satisfied.
Since it's my first time buying, I asked many questions, and I was so grateful for the kind and quick responses.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 6키로 비숑 키우는데 사이즈 딱 좋아요 가방도 가볍고 어깨도 안아파서 들고다니기 넘 편합니다 저희 강아지도 가방만 꺼내면 들어가겠다고 난리난리에요 엄청 푹신하고 주머니도 많고 디자인 진짜 귀여워서 들고 다닐 맛이 나요 완젼 굿 👍 아 배송도 엄청 빨리왔어요 감사함미당
reviews.content_en: I have a 6kg Bichon and the size is perfect! The bag is light and doesn't hurt my shoulders, so it's super convenient to carry. My pup also goes crazy as soon as I take the bag out - she wants to get in hehe! It's incredibly fluffy, has lots of pockets, and the design is so cute that it's fun to carry around. Totally great 👍 Oh, and the shipping was super fast! Thank you so much!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content:
민트랑 고민하다 블랙으로 햇는데
넘예🖤 가방 디자인도 너무 귀엽고 
편한지 강아지가 바로 쏘옥 들어가서 눕네용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I debated between mint and black, but went with black - and it's so pretty 🖤 The bag design is super cute and my pup immediately goes right in and lies down hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
연휴가 있었지만 배송빠르고 잘 받았습니다.
디자인 깔끔하고 아이도 좋아합니다.
reviews.content_en:
Even with the holiday, the shipping was fast and I received it well.
The design is clean and my pup likes it too.

reviews.name: 혼****
reviews.content:
생각했던 것보다 사이즈가 덜 넉넉해서 아쉽긴 하지만 저희애가 큰게 잘못인걸루😂
디자인 사진이랑 같아요 ㅎㅎ 이쁘네용
후기가 없어서 엄청 고민하다가 샀는데 맘에 들어요!
다만 아쉬운점은 락슬라이더가 아니라는 점 ㅠㅠ 
크게 신경쓰일 정도는 아니지만 가격이 가격인만큼 그부분이 조금 아쉽더라구요!

아이가 다른 가방은 들어가기도 싫어했는데 요건 쏙 들어가서 편하게 엎드리는거 보고 놀랐어요 ㅎㅎ
바닥 처짐 없고, 소재도 생활 방수되고 ㅎㅎ
어깨패드도 편안합니다!
따로 크로스끈 필요없이 길이조절로 맬수있어서 좋아요
세로 길이도 넉넉해서 편하게 잘 있구요
더스트백이 있어서 때 안타게 잘 보관할 수 있겠어요!
reviews.content_en:
The size is a bit smaller than I expected which is disappointing, but that's on us for having a bigger pup 😂 The design matches the photos hehe it's pretty!
I was really hesitant to buy since there were no reviews, but I'm happy with it!
The only downside is that it doesn't have a lock slider ㅠㅠ It's not a big deal, but given the price point, that part was a bit disappointing.

My pup didn't want to go into other bags, but seeing her go right into this one and lie down comfortably was surprising hehe The bottom doesn't sag, the material is water-resistant hehe The shoulder pad is comfortable too! 
I like that I can adjust the length without needing a separate cross strap.
The vertical length is generous so it's comfortable hehe
There's a dust bag so I can store it without worrying about stains!
All in all, I'm very happy!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 가볍고 아이가 편안해 해요 그리고 재질도 너무 좋네요~^^
reviews.content_en: It's lightweight and my pup feels comfortable in it. The material quality is really great too~^^

reviews.name: 숙****
reviews.content:
사자마자 세일해서 열받앗지만  급해서 그냥 또 샀어요 
고민하다 산건데 정말이쁘고 잘산거같아요

끈조절되고 주머니많고
무엇보다 가벼워요
reviews.content_en:
It went on sale right after I bought it which was annoying, but since I was in a rush I just bought another one at the sale price.
I was hesitant but I'm so glad I bought it - it's really pretty and a great purchase!

The straps are adjustable, lots of pockets,
and most importantly, it's super light!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배송이 빨라서 좋았어요
상품도 이쁘고 품질도 좋아요
reviews.content_en:
The shipping was fast which was great!
The product is pretty and the quality is good!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 사고싶었던 제품인데 바잇미 특별 할인 기간에 장만했어요 박스형이라 편한지 강아지가 잘 들어가네요 가방은 가볍고 튼튼합니다
reviews.content_en: It's a product I wanted to buy, and I managed to get it during BITE ME's special discount period. Since it's box-shaped, my pup gets in easily. The bag is light and sturdy.

reviews.name: 혀****
reviews.content:
작성된 리뷰에 단점이 보이지 않아서 
그래도 튼튼하겠다 싶어 나름 꼼꼼히 검색해보고 정착한 가방입니다!!

장점은 많은듯 했지만, 저희 애들이 사용할땐 가방 무너짐이 좀 있었습니다!
그리구 여자가 들기에는 어떠한 좋은 가방도 무거울수밖에 없다는 사실을 알게해준 가방입니다 ㅠㅠㅠ 
그만큼 가방은 가벼운편인듯하나, 저희 애가 무게가 좀 나가면 여자가 들기엔 무겁습니당 ㅠ

그리고 색상은 블랙이라 털이 많이 붙습니다
털이 안붙을수가 없어요 ~~~~ 🥲
reviews.content_en:
I couldn't see any downsides in the existing reviews,
so I thought 'it must be sturdy' and researched carefully before settling on this bag!!

There seemed to be many advantages, but when my pups used it, the bag did collapse a bit!
Also, this bag taught me the fact that no matter how good a bag is, it's bound to be heavy for a woman to carry ㅠㅠㅠ
So the bag is relatively light, but when my pup is a bit heavier, it's heavy for a woman to carry ㅠ

Also, since it's black, fur sticks to it a lot.
There's no way fur won't stick ~~~~ 🥲

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무 편하고 예뻐요! 강아지가 이동가방을 엄청 좋아하는데 마롱백도 머무너무 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: It's so comfortable and pretty! My dog loves carrier bags so much, and she loves the Marong bag just as much!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
배송도 빠르고 가방도 폭닥폭닥 너무 예뻐요
그리고 무엇보다 바닥처짐이 1도 없어요👍
reviews.content_en:
The shipping was fast and the bag is so fluffy and pretty!
And most of all, there's zero sagging at the bottom 👍

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 디자인도 예쁘고 강아지가 너무 편안해해요
reviews.content_en: The design is beautiful and my dog is so comfortable in it

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 3.4 말티푸에요 사이즈는 넉넉하고 살짝 큰 느낌도 있어서 속에 쿠션이나 이불 하나 더 깔아주면 딱 맞아요 ㅎㅎ 일단 밑 쳐짐이 없어서 들었을때 아이가 편안해하고 또 폭신폭신해서 가방 열자마자 안에 들어가서 쉬네요 ㅎㅎ 디자인도 넘넘 예쁩니다!
reviews.content_en: 3.4kg Maltipoo here. The size is generous, maybe even a bit roomy, so I just add an extra cushion or blanket inside and it's perfect! haha It has no sag at the bottom, so when I pick it up my pup feels secure. Plus it's so fluffy that she jumps right in to rest as soon as I open the bag haha The design is absolutely adorable!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무너무이뻐요~
아이가쏙들어가서안나온다는..ㅋㅋ
오래오래잘쓸수있을꺼같아요~^^
reviews.content_en:
It's SO pretty~
My pup fits inside perfectly and won't come out...lol
I think I'll be able to use it for a long time~^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 이뻐요.  편하게 잘이용하고 있어요.
reviews.content_en: It's cute. I'm using it comfortably.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 디자인 깔끔하고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The design is clean and nice

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
크림색 넘 이뻐용 ~
4.7키로 등길ㅇ이 33cm 입니뎌
reviews.content_en:
The cream color is so pretty~
My pup is 4.7kg with a back length of 33cm

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content:
마카롱같은 귀엽고 예쁜 마론백.
저희집아가가 편하고 좋은지 가방에만 들어가면 쌔근쌔근 자요~
외출시 은근히 챙길거많은데 주머니도 많아서 너무유용해요~
가방이 예쁘니 사진이 더 살아나는 느낌?
reviews.content_en: Such a cute and pretty macaroon-like marron bag. Our little one loves it so much she falls right asleep snoring as soon as she gets in the bag~ There's actually a lot to carry on outings, and having so many pockets makes it really useful~ Since the bag itself is so pretty, the photos turn out even better?

reviews.name: 띠****
reviews.content: 검정색이라 무난하게 들고다니기 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Black is easy to carry around without worrying about it clashing with outfits

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 다룬가방은 절대 안들어가는데 이 가방은 쏙 들어가서 안나오네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My pup won't get into other bags at all, but she slides right into this one and won't come out lol

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 우리 강아지가 너무 좋아해요. 정말 푹신푹신해요.
reviews.content_en: Our dog loves it so much. It's really so fluffy and soft.

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 가방 가볍고 디자인도 예뻐요 무너짐도 없어서 좋구요 파스텔톤의 가방들이 예쁘긴 하지만 오염될 걱정 때문에 막 쓰기 조금 그런데 색상이 블랙이라 좋고 블랙 색상인데도 너무 깔끔하고 시크한 매력의 가방입니다.
reviews.content_en: The bag is light and the design is pretty. It doesn't collapse either, which is great. The pastel-colored bags are beautiful but I hesitate to use them much because I worry about staining. I like that this one is black, and even though it's black, the bag has such a clean and chic appeal.

reviews.name: 상****
reviews.content: 진짜,,,너무 가볍고, 검정색이라서 ootd 착붙인 가방이에요ㅠㅠ 강아지도 너무 편안해서 가방에 들어가려고 난리를 치는 그런 진짜,, 너무 좋은 제품,,
reviews.content_en: Honestly...it's so light, and since it's black it matches every outfit perfectly ㅠㅠ My dog is so comfortable that she's desperate to get into the bag, like...it's really such a great product,,

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 깔끔하고 사람 패딩 소재 같아서 오염에 강해요 사이즈 조금만 작게 나오면 더 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: It's clean-looking and feels like human padding material, so it's resistant to staining. I think it would be even better if the size came a bit smaller!

reviews.name: R****
reviews.content:
어께끈 길이가 조절이 되는게 제일 큰 강점인거 같아요
옆면이 딱딱허지
reviews.content_en: I think the adjustable shoulder strap length is the biggest strength. The sides feel a bit stiff though

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 지인이 구매한 마롱백에 너무 잘 들어가서 바로 구매했어요 ~ 역시나 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: My friend bought a marron bag and my pup fit in it so well that I bought one right away~ And I love it just as much!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 블랙 에디션 보자마자 반해서 바로 구매했어요. 확실히 블랙이 시크한 매력이 있는 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: I fell in love with the black edition as soon as I saw it and bought it immediately. Black definitely has that chic charm!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 울 강아지가 넘 좋아합니다 최애 가방🤎
reviews.content_en: Our dog loves it so much. My favorite bag 🤎

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 이쁘고 고급스러운 백이에요^^
reviews.content_en: It's cute and looks luxurious^^
